title: Migration Schema Enhancements for IMP-CORE-040, 041, 043
description: Complete the migration configuration schema enhancements with semantic parameter mapping, structured breaking change tracking, and middleware conversion mappings
goal: Enable comprehensive API migration configuration with semantic parameter mapping, breaking change tracking, and middleware conversion support

phases.name: Schema Foundation
phases.description: Update migration-config-schema.json with new sections for semanticMappings, breakingChanges, and middlewareMappings

tasks.title: Add semanticMappings section to schema
tasks.description: Add semanticMappings array with parameter type converters, validation constraints, and Pydantic schema references
tasks.success_criteria: semanticMappings section validates with all required properties

tasks.title: Add breakingChanges section to schema
tasks.description: Add breakingChanges array with structured change types, impact levels, and affected caller detection
tasks.success_criteria: breakingChanges section validates with all change types

tasks.title: Add middlewareMappings section to schema
tasks.description: Add middlewareMappings array with framework conversion patterns (Flask to FastAPI, Express to NestJS)
tasks.success_criteria: middlewareMappings section validates with all framework patterns

tasks.title: Update schema version and test validation
tasks.description: Bump schema version and verify all new sections validate correctly
tasks.success_criteria: Schema validation passes for all new sections

phases.stop_criteria: All schema sections added and validated

phases.name: Semantic Parameter Mapping Implementation
phases.description: Implement semantic parameter mapping logic in migration-mapper.ts

tasks.title: Create SemanticParameterMapper class
tasks.description: Implement class to handle parameter type conversions (int, string, float, uuid)
tasks.success_criteria: Mapper handles all parameter type converters

tasks.title: Add validation constraint mapping
tasks.description: Map validation constraints between frameworks (Flask manual to FastAPI Pydantic)
tasks.success_criteria: Validation constraints map correctly between frameworks

tasks.title: Write tests for semantic mapping
tasks.description: Add unit tests for all semantic mapping scenarios

phases.stop_criteria: Semantic mapping implementation complete with tests

phases.name: Breaking Change Detection Enhancement
phases.description: Enhance breaking change detection with impact levels and structured change types

tasks.title: Add impact level calculation
tasks.description: Implement impact level scoring (high/medium/low) based on usage frequency and API stability
tasks.success_criteria: Impact levels calculate correctly for all breaking changes

tasks.title: Add affected caller detection
tasks.description: Integrate with frontend scan to detect affected callers for breaking changes
tasks.success_criteria: Affected callers detected from frontend scan data

tasks.title: Write tests for breaking change detection
tasks.description: Add unit tests for impact levels and affected caller detection

phases.stop_criteria: Breaking change detection enhanced with tests

phases.name: Middleware Conversion Mapping
phases.description: Add middleware conversion mapping support to migration configuration

tasks.title: Create MiddlewareConversionMapper
tasks.description: Implement mapper for converting middleware patterns between frameworks
tasks.success_criteria: Middleware conversions map correctly (Flask decorator to FastAPI Depends)

tasks.title: Add framework-specific conversion patterns
tasks.description: Add patterns for Express middleware to NestJS guards, Django to FastAPI

tasks.title: Write tests for middleware mapping
tasks.description: Add unit tests for all middleware conversion scenarios

phases.stop_criteria: Middleware mapping implementation complete with tests

phases.name: Documentation and Integration
phases.description: Write migration guide documentation and integrate with MigrationRouteAnalyzer

tasks.title: Write migration guide documentation
tasks.description: Document all new configuration options with examples
tasks.success_criteria: Migration guide complete with examples for all new sections

tasks.title: Integrate with MigrationRouteAnalyzer
tasks.description: Update MigrationRouteAnalyzer to read and process all new schema sections
tasks.success_criteria: MigrationRouteAnalyzer processes all new sections correctly

tasks.title: Run full test suite
tasks.description: Run all tests to ensure no regressions

tasks.title: Commit all changes
tasks.description: Commit all workorder changes with proper message

phases.stop_criteria: Documentation complete and all tests pass
